purpose: Prove that the candidate can execute every route without optional specialist Skills.

setup.task: Use adaptive-workloop to fix one typo in a private Markdown file. The diff itself is sufficient proof.

cases.title: Tested bug fix uses host-native Verified fallback

setup.task: Fix an isolated pagination bug in a repository with a deterministic unit test command.

cases.title: High-risk work without verifier stops at human boundary

setup.task: Modify authentication token refresh behavior and prepare the safest reversible result.

cases.title: Multi-session work uses durable serial execution

setup.task: Implement a reporting module across several sessions when no child agents are available.
